nasb.text: for a friend of mine has come to me from a journey, and I have nothing to set before him’;

esv.text: for a friend of mine has arrived on a journey, and I have nothing to set before him’;

cnv.text: 因為我有一個朋友旅行來到我這裡，我沒有甚麼可以招待他。’

ccb.text: 因为有一位朋友远道而来，我家没有什么可以招待他。’

csbs.text: 因为有一个朋友旅途中来到我这里，我没有什么可以招待他。’
